entities.name: BEET ARMYWORM
entities.description: Spodoptera exigua, an economic pest of chickpea

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Cicer arietinum L., the crop being studied for resistance

entities.name: MEXICO
entities.description: A region where beet armyworm is an economic pest

entities.name: INDIAN SUBCONTINENT
entities.description: A region where beet armyworm is an economic pest

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand attack by beet armyworm larvae

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: A breeding method used to develop the CRIL-7 population

entities.name: CRIL-7
entities.description: A specific chickpea recombinant inbred line population developed from a cross between FLIP 84-92C and PI 599072

entities.name: FLIP 84-92C
entities.description: A susceptible Cicer arietinum line used as a parent for CRIL-7

entities.name: PI 599072
entities.description: A resistant Cicer reticulatum accession used as a parent for CRIL-7

entities.name: GLASSHOUSE SCREENING
entities.description: A method used to rate resistance based on post-trial larval weights

entities.name: GROWTH CHAMBER TRIAL
entities.description: A method used to measure early-instar larval weight gain and mortality

entities.name: LARVAL WEIGHT GAIN
entities.description: A metric used to determine the level of resistance or susceptibility to beet armyworm

entities.name: LARVAL MORTALITY
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate resistance to beet armyworm

entities.name: FLAVONOIDS
entities.description: Phytochemicals analyzed for their role in chickpea resistance to S. exigua

entities.name: ISOFLAVONOIDS
entities.description: Phytochemicals analyzed for their role in chickpea resistance to S. exigua
